---
title: "Patent Pills"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - "./*/index.md"
  type: grid
  sort: "title asc"
  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - subtitle
    - categories
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
---
This page is a curated archive of historical patents granted to women inventors around the world between 1850 and 1950. Each card highlights a filed application, its inventor, and the original records. Use the search and filter tools to explore innovations across countries and patentees.

<div class="archive-divider"></div>

<style>
.jm-dot {
width: 7px;
height: 7px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: #16a34a;
animation: jm-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
flex-shrink: 0;
}
@keyframes jm-pulse {
0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
50% { opacity: 0.3; }
}
.jm-bar a {
color: #15803d;
font-weight: 500;
text-decoration: underline;
text-decoration-color: #86efac;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.jm-bar a:hover { color: #166534; text-decoration-color: #16a34a; }
</style>

<div class="prompt-line">
  <i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> Women Inventors
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; 
  <i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> History of Technology
  &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  <i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> Patents
  <span class="cursor"></span>
</div>

<div class="archive-divider"></div>
